MODULE: cosmos.integration.tool_router
FILE: cosmos/integration/tool_router.py (1702 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Tool Router - Dynamic Tool Management and Routing

Provides intelligent tool routing with:
- Capability-based tool matching
- Dynamic tool discovery
- Tool composition for complex tasks
- Usage tracking and optimization

Novel Features:
- Semantic tool matching using embeddings
- Automatic to

CLASSES:
- ToolCategory(Enum): Tool categorization.
- ToolDefinition: Definition of a tool available to the system.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
- ToolExecutionResult: Result of tool execution.
- ToolRouter: Intelligent tool routing system.

Provides:
- Tool registration and discovery
- 
  Methods: def register_tool(self, tool: ToolDefinition) -> None
  Methods: def unregister_tool(self, name: str) -> bool

  Methods: async def execute(self, tool_name: str, parameters: dict, context: Optional[dict]=None) -> ToolExecu
  Methods: async def execute_chain(self, chain_name: str, initial_input: dict, context: Optional[dict]=None) ->
  Methods: def register_chain(self, name: str, tools: list[str]) -> bool
  Methods: def get_tool(self, name: str) -> Optional[ToolDefinition]
  Methods: def list_tools(self, category: Optional[ToolCategory]=None, enabled_only: bool=True) -> list[ToolDef
